creator: lreid@a.cs.okstate.edu
text:
Despite the udp patch included in the qemu port, the udp network protocol still does not function correctly in user network mode for a guest OS.

How-To-Repeat: Install the port emulators/qemu (qemu-0.8.2s.20070111)
Configure any guest OS in qemu
perform any udp network operation (dig www.freebsd.org, e.g.)
